html:
Exclusive to:  

Glommer's Goop is a Food Item dropped by Glommer periodically every 2-4 Days, or during their death. Other than its use as fuel for a Fire (with a fuel value of 360 seconds on a Fire Pit and 180 seconds on a Campfire), it can be eaten, providing 40 Health and around 9 Hunger, but decreasing Sanity by 50. It can also be used as a Fertilizer for Farming, with as much strength as Manure.

Tips

  • Since Wormwood uses it to fertilize himself instead of eating it, you can use it to heal without the negative sanity effect.
  • The sanity penalty is helpful in some scenarios, such as trying to farm Nightmare Fuel from Shadow Creatures or trying to lower an Insanity Obelisk.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord

Glommer's Goop is a Food Item dropped by Glommer periodically every 2-4 Days, or during their death. Other than its use as fuel for a Fire (with a fuel value of 360 seconds on a Fire Pit and 180 seconds on a Campfire), it can be eaten, providing 40 Health and around 9 Hunger, but decreasing Sanity by 50. It can also be used as a Fertilizer for Farming, with as much strength as Manure.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Since Wormwood uses it to fertilize himself instead of eating it, you can use it to heal without the negative sanity effect.
The sanity penalty is helpful in some scenarios, such as trying to farm Nightmare Fuel from Shadow Creatures or trying to lower an Insanity Obelisk.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Goop của Glommer là một Vật phẩm Thực phẩm được Glommer đánh rơi định kỳ 2-4 ngày một lần hoặc trong khi họ chết. Ngoài việc sử dụng làm nhiên liệu cho Lửa (với giá trị nhiên liệu là 360 giây trên Lò lửa và 180 giây trên Lửa trại), nó có thể được ăn, cung cấp 40 Máu và khoảng 9 Sức Đói, nhưng làm giảm Tinh Thần đi 50. Nó cũng có thể được sử dụng làm Phân bón cho Nông nghiệp, với sức mạnh tương đương với Phân.

'''Glommer's Goop''' is a [[Food]] [[Item]] dropped by [[Glommer]] periodically every 2-4 [[Day]]s, or during their death. Other than its use as fuel for a [[Fire]] (with a fuel value of 360 seconds on a Fire Pit and 180 seconds on a [[Campfire]]), it can be eaten, providing 40 [[Health]] and around 9 [[Hunger]], but decreasing [[Sanity]] by 50. It can also be used as a [[Fertilizer]] for [[Farming]], with as much strength as [[Manure]].

=={{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips==
* Since [[Wormwood]] uses it to fertilize himself instead of eating it, you can use it to heal without the negative sanity effect.
*The sanity penalty is helpful in some scenarios, such as trying to farm [[Nightmare Fuel]] from [[Shadow Creature]]s or trying to lower an [[Sanity|Insanity]] [[Obelisk]].
